examples: Kiss me once again, and go to thy trifles and amusements; for my malady distresseth me.
He stopped, blushed, then continued low and sadly, "Ah, my malady persecuteth me again, and my mind wandereth."
He tried the baths there for an internal malady.
The DSM's experts considered adding sensory processing disorder as a separate malady for the first time.
PVRL1 is indeed one of the genes involved in the malady in these places, too.
